mapper.sql:
sample.stable_id AS "${prefix}sampleId", patient.stable_id AS "${prefix}patientId", resource_node.resource_id AS "${prefix}resourceId", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS "${prefix}studyId"
, resource_node.url AS "${prefix}url"
,

patient.stable_id AS "${prefix}patientId", resource_node.resource_id AS "${prefix}resourceId", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS "${prefix}studyId"
, resource_node.url AS "${prefix}url"
,

resource_node.resource_id AS "${prefix}resourceId", cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS "${prefix}studyId"
, resource_node.url AS "${prefix}url"
,

FROM resource_node INNER JOIN sample ON resource_node.entity_internal_id = sample.internal_id AND resource_node.entity_type = 'SAMPLE' INNER JOIN patient ON sample.patient_id = patient.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study ON resource_node.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id

FROM resource_node INNER JOIN patient ON resource_node.entity_internal_id = patient.internal_id AND resource_node.entity_type = 'PATIENT' INNER JOIN cancer_study ON resource_node.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id
FROM resource_node INNER JOIN cancer_study ON resource_node.entity_internal_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id AND resource_node.entity_type = 'STUDY'
